items.title: Meta deactivates feature that let you generate AI images of any public Instagram account
items.summary: Meta has deactivated the Muse Image capability to create AI deepfakes of any public Instagram account you @-mention.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
items.summary: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: US cyber agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
items.summary: CISA said it "missed" an opportunity to get ahead of the security incident by not creating a response plan ahead of time.
